stemHtml: Which of these statements about an auto-brake system is correct?

options.a: When the auto-brake system is inoperative, in general take-off is not allowed, because maximum manual braking does not achieve the same deceleration as the auto-brake system in the RTO mode.
options.b: On most aeroplanes the auto-brake system provides the capability to select a fixed landing distance.
options.c: When using manual braking during taxiing, the auto-brake system gets disarmed.
options.d: When a low auto-brake setting is used during landing, the use of thrust reverses will reduce the brake temperature.
